recommendedActions.title: Same-role coordination unstable: reduce concurrency, verify owner ring config, then re-run
steps: 1) Verify A2A_SAME_ROLE_HANDLES contains the full stable handle ring and each instance uses a distinct handle.
2) Reduce same-role instance count to 1 temporarily to regain stability.
3) Increase OWNER_STALE_MS to avoid premature takeover (only after verifying progress surface stability).
4) Re-run a short benchmark with same-role on to confirm owner_stale/takeover drops to 0.

validationChecks.compareWindow: same workload; same-role=on; after config change

validationWorkflow.name: re-run gate (same-role traces)
validationWorkflow.compareRule: same_role_* reasons should drop; gateLevel improves
validationWorkflow.expectedOutcome: coordination becomes stable enough for long_run_ok or observe_only

validationWorkflow.name: re-run short same-role smoke (windowed)
validationWorkflow.compareRule: owner_stale/takeover decrease; no persistent contention loops
validationWorkflow.expectedOutcome: takeover becomes rare and purposeful (stale only)
validationWorkflow.passCondition: owner_stale/takeover == 0 over several loops (unless truly stale owner)
